programs.name: Machine Strength Circuit
programs.description: 12-week selectorized machine circuit for Margaret, designed around her right knee OA restrictions. All movements within safe ROM. Progressive load increases every 2 sessions, with balance training woven throughout.

program_json.summary: A 12-week machine-only strength program for Margaret that respects her knee osteoarthritis (90° ROM limit) and hypertension management. Systematic 5 lb load increases on the leg press every 2–3 sessions, with equal emphasis on upper body pulling, chest pressing, and fall-prevention balance work.
